scope: Implement the public Student Guide / Teacher Guide top-banner mode in the public site source, rebuild generated public-companion output, and strengthen production-surface validation around exact guide-toggle markers.

repo_identity.start_commit: b6b24ac audit: enforce production app and website experience gate

changes: Added a sticky-header Student Guide / Teacher Guide segmented mode control with visible Viewing labels, Switch labels, aria-pressed state, and public localStorage preference key senior-capstone-guide-mode.
Added visible home-page Student Guide and Teacher Guide summary cards that keep core source-aligned student and teacher responsibilities visible at the same time.
Added responsive styling for the guide control and guide cards.
Rebuilt generated public-companion app.js/styles.css from source.
Strengthened scripts/check-production-surfaces.mjs so future checks look for exact guide-toggle markers.
Extended tests/account-and-evidence-access.test.mjs to cover the public guide mode markers and no-auth boundary.
Updated MVP catalog, production surface registry, source crosswalk, backlog, automation memory, artifact registry, handoff ledger, rebuild log, run log, and this manifest.

validation.summary: Production surface leak check passed: 86 production text surfaces scanned; no guide-toggle pending warning.
Public companion and stakeholder review outputs match deterministic source expectations.
Three site roots and manifest pages are present.
Aggregate check passed: 118/118 tests, production checks, generated-output drift, route inventory, static Cloudflare checks, and live Cloudflare blocked only by missing CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN.

next_actions: Broaden no-hidden-core-content coverage proof across every public guide route.
Designate and build the canonical authenticated role-aware production app route.
Run live Cloudflare verification when CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN is available.
